context: This is the finish line of Unlock Spanish. No new words - instead you'll put everything together: the right article, ser vs estar, connectors, other people, and descriptions, all in one sentence.
explanation: No new words this time. Each prompt mixes several things you've learned - a connector here, an agreement there, the right "to be". Take it one tile at a time, and remember you can tap a placed tile to send it back to the bank. This is real Spanish, built by you.
